source.description: A reviewed six-panel graphite-and-colored-pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent front-facing denim jacket with relaxed downward sleeves on warm off-white paper; no person, body, hanger, lettering, logo, patch, extra garment, decorative border, or scene.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one shoulder line, torso block, center opening, collar reserve, sleeve gestures, cuff positions, and pocket footprints; wraps them with a relaxed jacket silhouette; adds the collar, plackets, pockets, cuffs, yoke, buttons, seams, folds, and shadow; then shades and colors only those established forms before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: shoulder line, torso block, center opening, collar reserve, sleeve gestures, cuff positions, and chest-pocket footprints
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes a front-facing jacket with slightly dropped shoulders, a straight torso, relaxed sleeves, and reserved collar and pocket areas.

final_elements.name: denim-jacket silhouette with pointed collar, two front plackets, relaxed sleeves, cuffs, and straight hem
final_elements.description: A confident outside contour turns the guides into a readable jacket while preserving the reserved front details.

final_elements.name: back yoke seam, two chest pockets and flaps, cuff seams, hem band, and six front buttons
final_elements.description: The jacket construction is completed with balanced pockets, structural bands, and a six-button front.

final_elements.name: double-stitch lines, restrained sleeve and torso folds, small buttonholes, and shallow ground shadow
final_elements.description: A few parallel seams, directional folds, buttonholes, and one shadow clarify denim structure without clutter.

final_elements.name: graphite depth with restrained indigo-blue colored-pencil shading and paper highlights
final_elements.description: Soft graphite and broken indigo shading separate the established panels, folds, and pockets while leaving visible paper texture.

frames.visible_job: Places the shoulder line, torso block, center opening, collar reserve, sleeve gestures, cuff positions, and two chest-pocket footprints at one fixed scale.
introduces: shoulder line, torso block, center opening, collar reserve, sleeve gestures, cuff positions, and chest-pocket footprints

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the pointed collar, two front plackets, relaxed sleeves, cuffs, and straight hem while leaving the reserved pocket areas blank.
introduces: denim-jacket silhouette with pointed collar, two front plackets, relaxed sleeves, cuffs, and straight hem
requires_prior_elements: shoulder line, torso block, center opening, collar reserve, sleeve gestures, cuff positions, and chest-pocket footprints

frames.visible_job: Adds the back-yoke seam, two chest pockets and flaps, cuff seams, hem band, and exactly six front buttons inside the established silhouette.
introduces: back yoke seam, two chest pockets and flaps, cuff seams, hem band, and six front buttons
requires_prior_elements: denim-jacket silhouette with pointed collar, two front plackets, relaxed sleeves, cuffs, and straight hem

frames.visible_job: Adds double-stitch lines, a few sleeve and torso folds, small buttonholes, and one shallow ground shadow to the completed jacket structure.
introduces: double-stitch lines, restrained sleeve and torso folds, small buttonholes, and shallow ground shadow
requires_prior_elements: denim-jacket silhouette with pointed collar, two front plackets, relaxed sleeves, cuffs, and straight hem
back yoke seam, two chest pockets and flaps, cuff seams, hem band, and six front buttons

frames.visible_job: Adds soft graphite depth and restrained indigo-blue colored pencil to the established jacket panels, seams, folds, pockets, cuffs, and shadow.
introduces: graphite depth with restrained indigo-blue colored-pencil shading and paper highlights
requires_prior_elements: denim-jacket silhouette with pointed collar, two front plackets, relaxed sleeves, cuffs, and straight hem
back yoke seam, two chest pockets and flaps, cuff seams, hem band, and six front buttons
double-stitch lines, restrained sleeve and torso folds, small buttonholes, and shallow ground shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established silhouette, collar, plackets, sleeves, pockets, buttons, seams, folds, restrained color, paper highlights, and shadow.
allowed_changes: restrained graphite and indigo colored-pencil shading
small highlight clarification on established denim panels and hardware

rejection_checks: No collar, placket, sleeve, cuff, hem, yoke, pocket, flap, button, seam, fold, color area, highlight, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The jacket must retain one front-facing pose, shoulder width, sleeve angle, torso length, scale, and crop across all six panels.
Reserve the collar and pocket footprints from step one; do not render finished torso seams beneath those covering forms.
Reject people, body parts, hangers, lettering, logos, patches, pins, extra garments, furniture, room scenes, or decorative borders.
The finish must read as an attainable graphite-and-colored-pencil sketch with visible paper and hand pressure, not glossy fashion art or a vector clothing icon.
